{{Infobox character
| name = Altavian Arelius
| aliases = Altavian
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Enforcer techniques]], silver full-body Enforcement}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Arelius family|House Arelius]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|sword artist, fighter}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Uncrowned (novel)|Uncrowned]]
}}

''See also: [[Altavian Arelius Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Altavian Arelius is a member of [[House Arelius]], a family that previously governed much of the [[Rosegold continent]] under the rule of the late [[Monarch Tiberian Arelius]]. A man in his early thirties with nearly white blond hair and blue eyes, Altavian possesses a calm, meditative demeanor. Physically, he is comparable in height to [[Lindon]] but has a leaner build suited for running and long-reaching strikes. During a competition, he faced [[Yerin Arelius]] in a duel where he utilized silver [[Enforcement]] and a goldsteel blade. Despite his skill, including the use of [[Striker techniques]], he was wounded by [[Yerin's sword]]-[[aura]] and physical strikes. Altavian is also a cousin to [[Eithan]] Arelius.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Altavian Arelius is a bloodline member of the core [[House]] and serves as [[Veris]]' partner on the [[House Arelius]] team. A [[sword]] artist specializing in [[Enforcer techniques]], he utilizes razor-sharp nails as his Goldsigns and is considered a potential fighter in the tournament. During an encounter, Altavian leaped over a maze to attack [[Yerin]] with his goldsteel blade while blazing with a silver full-body [[Enforcement]]. Following this engagement, he provided [[Yerin]] with an explanation regarding the [[Diamond Veins elixir]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Altavian Arelius]] is a member of the [[House Arelius]] team and [[Veris]]' partner.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Altavian Arelius]] is a [[sword]] artist who specializes in [[Enforcer techniques]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Altavian Arelius]] uses razor-sharp nails as his Goldsigns.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Altavian is a potential fighter in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Altavian Arelius]] is a bloodline member of the core [[House]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Altavian leaped over a maze and attacked [[Yerin]] with his [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Altavian blazed with a silver full-body [[Enforcement]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Altavian wields a goldsteel blade.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Altavian's full name is [[Altavian Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Altavian explained the [[Diamond Veins elixir]] to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Altavian is [[Veris Arelius]]'s cousin.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"It’s an elixir," Altavian’s voice explained to Yerin.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Arelius family]]
